author: kravetsone
abstract: Skill for building Subsonic / OpenSubsonic / Navidrome API clients in TypeScript across Node, Bun, Deno, Cloudflare Workers, Electron, and browser runtimes. Covers token+salt MD5 authentication (u/p/t/s/v/c/f), the OpenSubsonic apiKey extension, getOpenSubsonicExtensions feature-detection, all endpoint categories (system, browsing, album/song lists, search, playlists, media retrieval, annotation, sharing, podcast, jukebox, radio, bookmarks, scanning, user management), and every OpenSubsonic extension (formPost, songLyrics, transcodeOffset, indexBasedQueue, playbackReport, sonicSimilarity, getPodcastEpisode, tokenInfo). Documents Navidrome-specific quirks: IDs-as-strings, no video endpoints, search3 without Lucene, getUsers returning only authenticated user, multi-library via musicFolderId, reverse-proxy auth with ReverseProxyUserHeader, ND_BASEURL subpath, CVE-2025-27112 authbypass fix. Also covers the Navidrome native /api/* JWT REST (unstable): /auth/login, react-admin pagination (_sort/_order/_start/_end/filter), admin endpoints /api/plugin /api/library /api/missing /api/config, SSE /api/events?jwt=. Includes 5 templates (audioling-client, zero-dep minimal-client, apikey-client, navidrome-native-client, hono-proxy), a check-server.mjs capability-probe script, and a runnable home-feed example. Client-library comparison covers @audioling/open-subsonic-api-client, subsonic-api, @vmohammad/subsonic-api, subsonicjs. Server compatibility matrix includes Navidrome, Airsonic-Advanced, Gonic, LMS, Supysonic, Funkwhale, Ampache, Astiga.
